gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/307)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/307)
text: سَأَلْتُ الْخُرَاسَانِيَّ ( عليه السلام ) وَ قُلْتُ إِنَّ الْعَبَّاسِيَّ ذَكَرَ أَنَّكَ تُرَخِّصُ فِي الْغِنَاءِ فَقَالَ كَذَبَ الزِّنْدِيقُ مَا هَكَذَا قُلْتُ لَهُ سَأَلَنِي عَنِ الْغِنَاءِ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ إِنَّ رَجُلًا أَتَى أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فَسَأَلَهُ عَنِ الْغِنَاءِ فَقَالَ يَا فُلَانُ إِذَا مَيَّزَ اللَّهُ بَيْنَ الْحَقِّ وَ الْبَاطِلِ فَأَنَّى يَكُونُ الْغِنَاءُ فَقَالَ مَعَ الْبَاطِلِ فَقَالَ قَدْ حَكَمْتَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Al rayyan, from Yunus who said,

‘I asked Al-Khurasany<sup>asws</sup> (8th Imam<sup>asws</sup>), and I said that Al-Abbasy mentioned that you<sup>asws</sup> are allowing with regards to the singing (music)?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The apostate has lied! I<sup>asws</sup> did not say to him like this. He asked me<sup>asws</sup> about the singing (music), so I<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘A man came over to Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, so he asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the singing (music). So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘O so and so! If Allah<sup>azwj</sup> were to Differentiate between the Truth and the Falsehood, so where would the singing (music) be?’ So he said, ‘With the falsehood’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘So you have judged’.
en.sarwar: 25. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ali ibn al-Rayyan from Yunus who has said the following: “I once asked al-Khurasaniy, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘Al-‘Abbasiy has said that you allow al-Ghina’ (music (and singing)). He (the Imam) said, ‘The infidel has spoken a lie. I did not say so to him. He asked me about al-Ghina’ (music (and singing)) and I said, ‘Once a man came to abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and asked him about al-Ghina’ (music (and singing)). He (the Imam) said, “O so and so, if Allah distinguishes between truth and falsehood where is the place of al-Ghina’ (music (and singing))?” He replied, ‘It is in falsehood.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘So you have issued the judgment.’”
